verses.dev: अग्निमीळे पुरोहितं यज्ञस्य देवं रत्वीजम | होतारं रत्नधातमम ||
verses.iast: agnim īḻe purohitaṃ yajñasya devaṃ ratvījama | hotāraṃ ratnadhātamama ||
verses.eng: I Laud Agni, the chosen Priest, God, minister of sacrifice, The hotar, lavishest of wealth.

verses.dev: अग्निः पूर्वेभिर्र्षिभिरीड्यो नूतनैरुत | स देवानेह वक्षति ||
verses.iast: aghniḥ pūrvebhirṛṣibhirīḍyo nūtanairuta | sa devāneha vakṣati ||
verses.eng: Worthy is Agni to be praised by living as by ancient seers. He shall bring hitherward the Gods.

verses.iast: agninā rayim aśnavat poṣam eva divedive | yaśasaṃ vīravattamam ||
verses.eng: Through Agni man obtaineth wealth, yea, plenty waxing day by day, most rich in heroes, glorious.

sandhi.notes: Surface token aligns with multiple underlying words.

verses.dev: अग्ने यं यज्ञमध्वरं विश्वतः परिभूरसि । स इद्देवेषु गच्छति ॥
verses.iast: agne yaṃ yajñam adhvaraṃ viśvataḥ paribhūr asi | sa id deveṣu gacchati ||
verses.eng: Agni, the perfect sacrifice which thou encompassest about verily goeth to the Gods.

sandhi.notes: Surface token aligns with multiple underlying words.
Both sides of the boundary are consonantal.

verses.dev: अग्निर्होता कविक्रतुः सत्यश्चित्रश्रवस्तमः | देवो देवेभिरा गमत् ॥
verses.iast: agnir hotā kavikratuḥ satyaś citraśravastamaḥ | devo devebhir ā gamat ||
verses.eng: May Agni, sapient-minded Priest, truthful, most gloriously great, the God, come hither with the Gods.

verses.dev: यदङ्ग दाशुषे त्वमग्ने भद्रं करिष्यसि | तवेतत्सत्यमङ्गिरः ॥
verses.iast: yad aṅga dāśuṣe tvam agne bhadraṃ kariṣyasi | tav etat satyam aṅgiraḥ ||
verses.eng: Whatever blessing, Agni, thou wilt grant unto thy worshipper, that, Angiras, is indeed thy truth.

sandhi.notes: Surface token aligns with multiple underlying words.
Surface token aligns with multiple underlying words.
Surface token aligns with multiple underlying words.

verses.dev: उप त्वाग्ने दिवेदिवे दोषावस्तर्धिया वयं | नमो भरन्त एमसि ॥
verses.iast: upa tvāgne divedive doṣāvastar dhiyā vayaṃ | namo bharanta emasí ||
verses.eng: To thee, dispeller of the night, O Agni, day by day with prayer bringing thee reverence, we come.

verses.dev: राजन्तमध्वराणां गोपामृतस्य दीदिविम् | वर्धमानं स्वे दमे ॥
verses.iast: rājantam adhvarāṇāṃ gopām ṛtasya dīdivim | vardhamānaṃ sve dame ||
verses.eng: Ruler of sacrifices, guard of Law eternal, radiant One, increasing in thine own abode.

verses.dev: स नः पितेव सूनवेऽग्ने सुपायनो भव | सचस्वा नः स्वस्तये ॥
verses.iast: sa naḥ piteva sūnave agne supāyano bhava | sacasvā naḥ svastaye ||
verses.eng: Be to us easy of approach, even as a father to his son: Agni, be with us for our weal.

sandhi.notes: Left underlying form ends in visarga before the next segment.
